title: Robert I. Sutton endorses Incorruptible
summary: Stanford professor Robert Sutton says Incorruptible destroys the myth that only sleazy founders get rich, showing how to build humane, ethical, money-making companies.
blockquote: Incorruptible destroys the myth that only sleazy founders and companies get rich. Eric Ries shows you how to build a mission-driven company that will be humane, ethical, and make piles of money for decades. A rare joy to read.
attribution_title: Professor Emeritus at Stanford, bestselling author of The No Asshole Rule
